settings.heading: Academy
settings.subheading: Structured football development for juniors in a fun cage environment.

settings.label: JUNIOR DEVELOPMENT
settings.heading: Rulz Academy
settings.subheading: Our academy program focuses on technical skill development, game intelligence, and a love for the beautiful game — all in our unique cage football environment.
settings.free_trial: First Session is FREE — No Commitment Required!
settings.coaching_description: Our coaches hold FFA/AFC B & C Licences and KNVB (Dutch) Youth Elite Coaching Certification from the Australian Institute of Sport. Your child will train under some of the best-qualified coaches on the Gold Coast.

settings.title: Technical Skills
settings.description: Ball mastery, passing, dribbling, and finishing drills designed for cage football.

settings.title: Game Intelligence
settings.description: Decision-making, spatial awareness, and tactical understanding in small-sided games.

settings.title: Confidence Building
settings.description: Supportive environment where every player is encouraged to express themselves and take risks.

settings.heading: Questions About the Academy?
settings.subheading: Get in touch and we will tell you everything you need to know.
